updateTitle: EU AI Act — Supply Chain Transparency Obligations for High-Risk AI Systems
regulator: European Parliament / Council of the EU
changeSummary: New obligations for supply chain actors using high-risk AI in pharmaceutical manufacturing, quality control, and distribution. Requires conformity assessment documentation, risk management systems, and human oversight provisions for AI systems used in GMP-critical processes.

updateTitle: FDA DSCSA Enhanced Drug Distribution Security — Serialization Enforcement Deadline
sourceName: Drug Supply Chain Security Act (DSCSA) — Final Stabilization Period
changeSummary: End of the DSCSA stabilization period. Full enforcement of electronic interoperable traceability requirements. All trading partners must be able to exchange transaction information, transaction history, and transaction statements in electronic format at the package level.

updateTitle: ICH Q12 — Lifecycle Management Technical and Regulatory Considerations
changeSummary: New lifecycle management framework for post-approval changes to marketed drug products. Introduces Established Conditions (ECs) and Post-Approval Change Management Protocols (PACMPs) to reduce regulatory burden while maintaining product quality. Significant impact on supply chain change control and SCOR ENABLE phase.

updateTitle: EU GMP Annex 1 — Manufacture of Sterile Medicinal Products (Revised)
changeSummary: Major revision to sterile manufacturing requirements. Introduces Contamination Control Strategy (CCS), enhanced environmental monitoring, updated aseptic processing requirements, and expanded supply chain controls for incoming materials. Directly impacts MAKE and SOURCE SCOR phases.

updateTitle: USP <1083> — Good Distribution Practices for Radiopharmaceuticals
changeSummary: Updated distribution practices for radiopharmaceuticals including cold chain requirements, transport validation, and documentation standards. New provisions for last-mile delivery and real-time temperature monitoring requirements.

updateTitle: MHRA GxP Data Integrity Guidance — 2026 Update
sourceName: MHRA GxP Data Integrity Guidance and Definitions (Revision 2)
changeSummary: Revised guidance on ALCOA+ principles for electronic records. Clarifies expectations for cloud-hosted quality management systems, electronic batch records, and AI-assisted data review in pharmaceutical manufacturing contexts.

updateTitle: Health Canada GUI-0069 — Lines for Temperature Control of Drug Products During Storage and Transportation
changeSummary: Proposed amendment to temperature control guidelines for pharmaceutical storage and transportation. The update was rejected after review determined the changes were already covered by existing obligations in the compliance matrix and did not introduce new requirements.

sourceName: EMA ePI Common Standard — Consultation Draft
changeSummary: New electronic product information standard for pharmaceutical products marketed in the EU. Requires structured, machine-readable labeling data to replace or supplement traditional paper PI/PIL. Supply chain implications for packaging, labeling, and distribution systems.
